sqlCommand.descr: update TransX set PK = '40' , Amt2 = 0, Amt1 = -Amt1, Txt = 'Crcy true-up', Assgnmt = '', PC = '1600000100', CC = '',TP = '2200', TTY = '832', ProdCode = 'UNKNOWN', UWYR = '2018', AccYr = '2018', ReinLoc = 'USCT', BusCat = '', Contract = '54', CatCode = 'MNTAP', PTF = '', Broker = '', ReinName = '1000013203', RiskTerr = 'UNKN', Stat = '', TransCode = 'T0012', RefKey1 = '',RefKey2 = '',RefKey3 = '', Flex9 = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set PK = '50' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 < 0
update TransX set BusCat = '33', TTY = '', Broker = '1000000706', Stat = '10' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '4119900'
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID like '[batchID]%'

sqlSelect.descr: insert into TransX (KeyID,  GL, Amt1) values ('[batchID]',
